name: Stifling Thicket

abilities.name: Gift of the Queen
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model declares an action, if it is within 1" of an Underbrush marker, it receives +(t) to its duel total.

abilities.name: The Autumn Court
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage during the activation phase, it may drain a (t) to place itself in base contact with a friendly Underbrush marker within 3".

abilities.name: Renewed Growth
abilities.text: Once per activation. After successfully resolving an attack targeting an enemy, this model may discard a card to make an Underbrush marker into base contact with the target.

markers.name: Underbrush
markers.text: During the start phase of turn 1, make up to three Underbrush markers anywhere on the table, not in base contact with enemy models.

extraction_notes: The Underbrush marker definition is provided in the initial setup text rather than a dedicated markers section
